metadata.description: Generate 3D models from your images using Trellis 2. A native 3D generative model enabling versatile and high-quality 3D asset creation.

info.title: Queue OpenAPI for fal-ai/trellis-2
info.description: The OpenAPI schema for the fal-ai/trellis-2 queue.

remesh.title: Remesh
remesh.description: Rebuild the mesh topology for cleaner triangles. Slower but usually produces better results for downstream use (animation, 3D printing, etc).

resolution.title: Resolution
resolution.description: Output resolution; higher is slower but more detailed

ss_guidance_strength.title: Ss Guidance Strength
ss_guidance_strength.description: How closely the initial 3D structure follows the input image. Higher values produce more faithful but potentially noisier results.

shape_slat_sampling_steps.title: Shape Slat Sampling Steps
shape_slat_sampling_steps.description: Number of denoising steps for shape refinement. More steps = slower but potentially smoother geometry.

uv_unwrap_global_iterations.title: Uv Unwrap Global Iterations
uv_unwrap_global_iterations.description: Number of global clustering passes during UV chart computation. More passes produce more balanced charts.

remesh_band.title: Remesh Band
remesh_band.description: Controls how far remeshing can move vertices from the original surface. Higher values allow more smoothing but may lose fine details.

uv_unwrap_smooth_strength.title: Uv Unwrap Smooth Strength
uv_unwrap_smooth_strength.description: Smoothing strength applied to UV chart boundaries. Higher values reduce visible seams but may introduce UV distortion.

decimation_target.title: Decimation Target
decimation_target.description: Target number of vertices in the final mesh. Lower values produce smaller files but less detail. 500k is good for most uses, reduce to 20k-50k for web/mobile.

ss_guidance_interval_end.title: Ss Guidance Interval End
ss_guidance_interval_end.description: Fraction of the denoising process at which classifier-free guidance ends for stage 1 (sparse structure). Must be >= ss_guidance_interval_start.

tex_slat_guidance_rescale.title: Tex Slat Guidance Rescale
tex_slat_guidance_rescale.description: Dampens artifacts from high guidance in the texture stage. Increase if textures look noisy or have color banding.

remesh_project.title: Remesh Project
remesh_project.description: How much to project remeshed vertices back onto the original surface. 0 = no projection (smoother), 1 = full projection (preserves detail).

shape_slat_rescale_t.title: Shape Slat Rescale T
shape_slat_rescale_t.description: Controls noise schedule sharpness for shape refinement. Higher values produce sharper geometric details.

texture_size.title: Texture Size
texture_size.description: Resolution of the texture image baked onto the mesh. Higher values capture finer surface details but produce larger files.

ss_sampling_steps.title: Ss Sampling Steps
ss_sampling_steps.description: Number of denoising steps for the initial structure. More steps = slower but potentially higher quality.

image_url.title: Image Url
image_url.description: URL of the input image to convert to 3D

ss_rescale_t.title: Ss Rescale T
ss_rescale_t.description: Controls noise schedule sharpness for structure generation. Higher values produce sharper transitions.

shape_slat_guidance_interval_start.title: Shape Slat Guidance Interval Start
shape_slat_guidance_interval_start.description: Fraction of the denoising process at which classifier-free guidance starts for stage 2 (shape refinement). Guidance is only applied between interval_start and interval_end.

tex_slat_guidance_interval_end.title: Tex Slat Guidance Interval End
tex_slat_guidance_interval_end.description: Fraction of the denoising process at which classifier-free guidance ends for stage 3 (texture). Must be >= tex_slat_guidance_interval_start.

tex_slat_rescale_t.title: Tex Slat Rescale T
tex_slat_rescale_t.description: Controls noise schedule sharpness for texture generation. Higher values produce sharper texture details.

uv_unwrap_angle_threshold_deg.title: Uv Unwrap Angle Threshold Deg
uv_unwrap_angle_threshold_deg.description: Maximum angle (in degrees) between adjacent face normals allowed within a single UV chart. Lower values produce more charts with less distortion; higher values produce fewer, larger charts with potentially more stretching.

tex_slat_guidance_interval_start.title: Tex Slat Guidance Interval Start
tex_slat_guidance_interval_start.description: Fraction of the denoising process at which classifier-free guidance starts for stage 3 (texture). Guidance is only applied between interval_start and interval_end.

shape_slat_guidance_rescale.title: Shape Slat Guidance Rescale
shape_slat_guidance_rescale.description: Dampens artifacts from high guidance in the shape stage. Increase if you see noisy geometry.

shape_slat_guidance_interval_end.title: Shape Slat Guidance Interval End
shape_slat_guidance_interval_end.description: Fraction of the denoising process at which classifier-free guidance ends for stage 2 (shape refinement). Must be >= shape_slat_guidance_interval_start.

shape_slat_guidance_strength.title: Shape Slat Guidance Strength
shape_slat_guidance_strength.description: How closely the detailed geometry follows the input image. Higher values add more detail but may introduce noise.

ss_guidance_rescale.title: Ss Guidance Rescale
ss_guidance_rescale.description: Dampens artifacts from high guidance in stage 1. Lower values allow stronger guidance effects, higher values stabilize the output.

tex_slat_sampling_steps.title: Tex Slat Sampling Steps
tex_slat_sampling_steps.description: Number of denoising steps for texture generation. More steps = slower but potentially cleaner textures.

uv_unwrap_refine_iterations.title: Uv Unwrap Refine Iterations
uv_unwrap_refine_iterations.description: Number of local refinement passes during UV chart computation. Higher values produce cleaner chart boundaries at the cost of additional UV-unwrap time.

ss_guidance_interval_start.title: Ss Guidance Interval Start
ss_guidance_interval_start.description: Fraction of the denoising process at which classifier-free guidance starts for stage 1 (sparse structure). Guidance is only applied between interval_start and interval_end; outside this window the model runs unguided. Lower values apply guidance earlier.

tex_slat_guidance_strength.title: Tex Slat Guidance Strength
tex_slat_guidance_strength.description: How closely the texture follows the input image colors. Higher values produce more vivid but potentially oversaturated textures.

metadata.description: Rodin V2.5 by Hyper3D generates realistic and production ready 3D models from text or images.

info.title: Queue OpenAPI for fal-ai/hyper3d/rodin/v2.5
info.description: The OpenAPI schema for the fal-ai/hyper3d/rodin/v2.5 queue.

image_urls.description: URL of images to use while generating the 3D model. Required for Image-to-3D mode. Up to 5 images allowed.
image_urls.title: Image Urls

tier.title: Tier
tier.description: Generation tier. Higher tiers produce more detailed meshes but cost more. Extreme-High enables the highest-detail mode and bills at double the base rate. See more info in the [documentation](https://developer.hyper3d.ai/api-specification/rodin-gen2.5#use-gen-2.5-generation-with-following-gen-2.5-tiers).

geometry_file_format.title: Geometry File Format
geometry_file_format.description: Format of the geometry file. Possible values: glb, usdz, fbx, obj, stl. Default is glb.

is_micro.title: Is Micro
is_micro.description: Generate finer micro-scale geometric detail. Only effective with `tier="Gen-2.5-Extreme-High"`.

geometry_instruct_mode.title: Geometry Instruct Mode
geometry_instruct_mode.description: Faithful mode follows the input closely; creative mode permits more variation. Only effective in the Medium and High tiers.

TAPose.title: T/A Pose
TAPose.description: Generate characters in T-pose or A-pose format, making them easier to rig and animate in 3D software.

use_original_alpha.title: Use Original Alpha
use_original_alpha.description: When enabled, preserves the transparency channel from input images during 3D generation.

preview_render.title: Preview Render
preview_render.description: Generate a preview render image of the 3D model along with the model files.

texture_mode.title: Texture Mode
texture_mode.description: Texture generation quality. When unset, the API picks a default appropriate for the tier.

material.title: Material
material.description: Material type. PBR: physically-based materials with realistic lighting. Shaded: baked lighting with no PBR maps. All: both PBR and Shaded variants. None: geometry only with no textures.

bbox_condition.title: Bbox Condition
bbox_condition.description: An array that specifies the bounding box dimensions [width, height, length]. Must be exactly three positive integers.

seed.title: Seed
seed.description: Seed value for randomization, ranging from 0 to 65535. Optional.

quality_mesh_option.title: Quality Mesh Option
quality_mesh_option.description: Combined quality and mesh type selection. Quad = smooth surfaces, Triangle = detailed geometry. Maps to `mesh_mode` (Quad/Raw) and `quality_override` (face count) on the Hyper3D API. Valid face counts depend on the selected tier. Up to 1M Triangle is supported for tiers Extreme-Low, Low, and Medium. Up to 2M Triangle (as low as 20K Triangle) is supported for tiers High and Extreme-High.

hd_texture.title: Hd Texture
hd_texture.description: Enables enhanced texture post-processing for higher visual fidelity.

addons.title: Addons
addons.description: Optional add-ons. Possible values are `HighPack`. HighPack provides 4K resolution textures and high-poly geometry, instead of default 2K. If in `quality_mesh_option` Quad is selected, the number of faces will be ~16 times of the number of faces selected in the quality part. Single values are accepted as a shorthand for a list with one item.

texture_delight.title: Texture Delight
texture_delight.description: Removes baked lighting/highlights from the generated textures.

is_symmetric.title: Is Symmetric
is_symmetric.description: Symmetry mode for the generated mesh. `symmetric` forces left-right symmetry; `balanced` favors symmetry without enforcing it; `asymmetric` allows freely asymmetric geometry; `unknown` lets the model decide based on the inputs.

prompt.title: Prompt
prompt.description: A textual prompt to guide model generation. Optional for Image-to-3D mode - if empty, the model auto-generates a prompt from the images.
examples: A futuristic robot with sleek metallic design.

model_meshes.title: Model Meshes
model_meshes.description: Additional generated 3D object files returned by Hyper3D besides model_mesh.

metadata.description: Meshy-6 is the latest model from Meshy. It generates realistic and production ready 3D models.

info.title: Queue OpenAPI for fal-ai/meshy/v6/image-to-3d
info.description: The OpenAPI schema for the fal-ai/meshy/v6/image-to-3d queue.

x-fal-metadata.about:
Convert an image to a 3D model using Meshy-6 Preview.

Meshy-6 Preview features:
- Latest model with best quality
- Most accurate geometry reconstruction
- Superior texture quality
- Processing time: 5-10 minutes
- Best for high-quality results

enable_rigging.title: Enable Rigging
enable_rigging.description: Automatically rig the generated model as a humanoid character. Includes basic walking and running animations. Best results with humanoid characters that have clearly defined limbs.

enable_pbr.title: Enable Pbr
enable_pbr.description: Generate PBR Maps (metallic, roughness, normal) in addition to base color

pose_mode.title: Pose Mode
pose_mode.description: Pose mode for the generated model. 'a-pose' generates an A-pose, 't-pose' generates a T-pose, empty string for no specific pose.

is_a_t_pose.title: Is A T Pose
is_a_t_pose.description: Deprecated: use pose_mode instead. When true, generates a T-pose model.

should_remesh.title: Should Remesh
should_remesh.description: Whether to enable the remesh phase

animation_action_id.title: Animation Action Id
animation_action_id.description: Animation preset ID from Meshy's library. Only used when enable_animation is true; in that case it must be in [0, 696] (``0`` is the "Idle" preset) and is otherwise rejected with a 422. See https://docs.meshy.ai/en/api/animation-library for available action IDs.

symmetry_mode.title: Symmetry Mode
symmetry_mode.description: Controls symmetry behavior during model generation. Off disables symmetry, Auto determines it automatically, On enforces symmetry.

image_url.title: Image Url
image_url.description: Image URL or base64 data URI for 3D model creation. Supports .jpg, .jpeg, and .png formats. Also supports AVIF and HEIF formats which will be automatically converted.

topology.title: Topology
topology.description: Specify the topology of the generated model. Quad for smooth surfaces, Triangle for detailed geometry.

enable_safety_checker.title: Enable Safety Checker
enable_safety_checker.description: If set to true, input data will be checked for safety before processing.

enable_animation.title: Enable Animation
enable_animation.description: Apply an animation preset to the rigged model. Requires enable_rigging to be true.

texture_prompt.title: Texture Prompt
texture_prompt.description: Text prompt to guide the texturing process

target_polycount.title: Target Polycount
target_polycount.description: Target number of polygons in the generated model

rigging_height_meters.title: Rigging Height Meters
rigging_height_meters.description: Approximate height of the character in meters. Only used when enable_rigging is true.

texture_image_url.title: Texture Image Url
texture_image_url.description: 2D image to guide the texturing process

texture_urls.title: Texture Urls
texture_urls.description: Array of texture file objects, matching Meshy API structure

animation_fbx.description: Animated 3D model in FBX format. Only present when enable_animation is true.

thumbnail.description: Preview thumbnail of the generated model

rigged_character_fbx.description: Rigged character in FBX format. Only present when enable_rigging is true.

animation_glb.description: Animated 3D model in GLB format. Only present when enable_animation is true.

rigged_character_glb.description: Rigged character in GLB format. Only present when enable_rigging is true.

basic_animations.description: Basic walking and running animations. Only present when enable_rigging is true.

rig_task_id.title: Rig Task Id
rig_task_id.description: Rigging task ID. Only present when enable_rigging is true.

seed.description: The seed used for generation (if available)

TextureFiles.description: Texture files downloaded and uploaded to CDN

x-fal-metadata.about:
Convert multiple images to a 3D model using Meshy-6 Preview.

Multi-Image to 3D features:
- Use 1-4 images of the same object from different angles
- Better geometry reconstruction from multiple viewpoints
- Latest Meshy-6 quality and accuracy
- Same texture options as single image-to-3D
- Processing time: 5-10 minutes

For best results:
- Use images of the same object from different angles
- Ensure consistent lighting across images
- Include front, side, and back views when possible

Note: If more than 4 images are provided, only the first 4 will be used.

SAM3DBodyPersonMetadata.description:
Per-person metadata for body reconstruction.

The 70 MHR keypoints follow the ordering in `SAM3D_BODY_MHR70_KEYPOINT_NAMES`
(also exposed at the top level of `SAM3DBodyMetadata.keypoint_names`). The
MHR parameter fields (`shape_params`, `body_pose_params`, ...) mirror the
outputs of the upstream `SAM3DBodyEstimator.process_one_image` for
client-side pose manipulation, inverse linear-blend skinning, and canonical
mesh reconstruction. They are only populated when `include_mhr_params=True`.

global_rot.title: Global Rot
global_rot.description: Global root rotation produced by MHR. Shape matches the upstream tensor (axis-angle [3] or rotation matrix [3, 3]).

pred_joint_coords.description: Skeleton joint positions in world space [[x, y, z], ...]. One row per MHR joint.

hand_pose_params.title: Hand Pose Params
hand_pose_params.description: Per-joint hand pose parameters (axis-angle form) from the MHR model.

mhr_model_params.title: Mhr Model Params
mhr_model_params.description: Packed MHR parameter vector (concatenated shape/pose/expression/scale). Shape is forwarded as-is from the upstream model.

person_id.title: Person Id
person_id.description: Index of the person in the scene

keypoints_2d.title: Keypoints 2D
keypoints_2d.description: 2D keypoints [[x, y], ...] - 70 MHR body keypoints in image coordinates. See `SAM3DBodyMetadata.keypoint_names` for the ordered name of each index.

keypoints_3d.title: Keypoints 3D
keypoints_3d.description: 3D keypoints [[x, y, z], ...] - 70 MHR body keypoints in camera space. Ordering matches `keypoints_2d` / `SAM3DBodyMetadata.keypoint_names`.

shape_params.title: Shape Params
shape_params.description: MHR identity (β) shape parameters. Enables local canonical-pose mesh reconstruction when combined with the MHR model.

pred_global_rots.title: Pred Global Rots
pred_global_rots.description: Per-joint global rotations (world-space), typically [N_joints, 3, 3] rotation matrices. Needed for inverse linear-blend skinning / un-posing clients.

body_pose_params.title: Body Pose Params
body_pose_params.description: Per-joint body pose parameters (axis-angle form) from the MHR model.

x-fal-metadata.about:
Convert multiple images to a 3D model using Meshy-5.

Multi-Image to 3D features:
- Use 1-4 images of the same object from different angles
- Better geometry reconstruction from multiple viewpoints
- Same texture options as single image-to-3D
- Processing time: 3-7 minutes

For best results:
- Use images of the same object from different angles
- Ensure consistent lighting across images
- Include front, side, and back views when possible

Note: If more than 4 images are provided, only the first 4 will be used.

enable_rigging.title: Enable Rigging
enable_rigging.description: Automatically rig the generated model as a humanoid character. Includes basic walking and running animations. Best results with humanoid characters that have clearly defined limbs.

enable_pbr.title: Enable Pbr
enable_pbr.description: Generate PBR Maps (metallic, roughness, normal) in addition to base color. Requires should_texture to be true.

image_urls.title: Image Urls
image_urls.description: 1 to 4 images for 3D model creation. All images should depict the same object from different angles. Supports .jpg, .jpeg, .png formats, and AVIF/HEIF which will be automatically converted. If more than 4 images are provided, only the first 4 will be used.

pose_mode.title: Pose Mode
pose_mode.description: Pose mode for the generated model. 'a-pose' generates an A-pose, 't-pose' generates a T-pose, empty string for no specific pose.

is_a_t_pose.title: Is A T Pose
is_a_t_pose.description: Deprecated: use pose_mode instead. When true, generates a T-pose model.

should_remesh.title: Should Remesh
should_remesh.description: Whether to enable the remesh phase. When false, returns triangular mesh ignoring topology and target_polycount.

should_texture.title: Should Texture
should_texture.description: Whether to generate textures. False provides mesh without textures for 5 credits, True adds texture generation for additional 10 credits.

animation_action_id.title: Animation Action Id
animation_action_id.description: Animation preset ID from Meshy's library. Only used when enable_animation is true; in that case it must be in [0, 696] (``0`` is the "Idle" preset) and is otherwise rejected with a 422. See https://docs.meshy.ai/en/api/animation-library for available action IDs.

symmetry_mode.title: Symmetry Mode
symmetry_mode.description: Controls symmetry behavior during model generation.

topology.title: Topology
topology.description: Specify the topology of the generated model. Quad for smooth surfaces, Triangle for detailed geometry.

enable_safety_checker.title: Enable Safety Checker
enable_safety_checker.description: If set to true, input data will be checked for safety before processing.

enable_animation.title: Enable Animation
enable_animation.description: Apply an animation preset to the rigged model. Requires enable_rigging to be true.

texture_prompt.title: Texture Prompt

target_polycount.description: Target number of polygons in the generated model

rigging_height_meters.title: Rigging Height Meters

metadata.description: Generate 3D models from one or more images using ReconViaGen 0.5

x-fal-metadata.about: Generate a 3D model from one or more images.

multi_image_strategy.description: Strategy for combining multi-view conditioning. 'adaptive_guidance_weight' works best in most cases. Only used when more than one image is provided.
multi_image_strategy.title: Multi Image Strategy

ss_source.description: Sparse structure source. 'mesh' gives best quality, 'direct' is fastest, 'mvtrellis2' uses multi-view TRELLIS.2.
ss_source.title: Sparse Structure Source

shape_slat_guidance_strength.description: How closely the detailed geometry follows the input.
shape_slat_guidance_strength.title: Shape SLat Guidance Strength

texture_size.description: Resolution of the texture image baked onto the mesh.
texture_size.title: Texture Size

shape_slat_sampling_steps.description: Number of denoising steps for shape refinement.
shape_slat_sampling_steps.title: Shape SLat Sampling Steps

tex_slat_rescale_t.description: Controls noise schedule sharpness for texture generation.
tex_slat_rescale_t.title: Texture SLat Rescale T

ss_guidance_strength.description: How closely the initial 3D structure follows the input. Higher values produce more faithful but potentially noisier results.
ss_guidance_strength.title: Sparse Structure Guidance Strength

tex_slat_guidance_strength.description: How closely the texture follows the input colors.
tex_slat_guidance_strength.title: Texture SLat Guidance Strength

ss_guidance_rescale.description: Dampens artifacts from high guidance in stage 1.
ss_guidance_rescale.title: Sparse Structure Guidance Rescale

slat_guidance_rescale.description: Guidance rescale for SLat stage (only used when ss_source='mesh').
slat_guidance_rescale.title: SLat Guidance Rescale

ss_rescale_t.description: Controls noise schedule sharpness for structure generation.
ss_rescale_t.title: Sparse Structure Rescale T

shape_slat_rescale_t.description: Controls noise schedule sharpness for shape refinement.
shape_slat_rescale_t.title: Shape SLat Rescale T

slat_sampling_steps.description: Sampling steps for SLat stage (only used when ss_source='mesh').
slat_sampling_steps.title: SLat Sampling Steps

ss_sampling_steps.description: Number of denoising steps for the initial structure.
ss_sampling_steps.title: Sparse Structure Sampling Steps

tex_slat_sampling_steps.description: Number of denoising steps for texture generation.
tex_slat_sampling_steps.title: Texture SLat Sampling Steps

shape_slat_guidance_rescale.description: Dampens artifacts from high guidance in the shape stage.
shape_slat_guidance_rescale.title: Shape SLat Guidance Rescale

image_urls.description: One or more views of the same object. Multiple views yield higher-quality 3D reconstruction.
image_urls.title: Image URLs

slat_rescale_t.description: Rescale T for SLat stage (only used when ss_source='mesh').
slat_rescale_t.title: SLat Rescale T

resolution.description: Output resolution; higher is slower but more detailed
resolution.title: Resolution

decimation_target.description: Target number of vertices in the final mesh.
decimation_target.title: Decimation Target

slat_guidance_strength.description: Guidance strength for SLat stage (only used when ss_source='mesh').
slat_guidance_strength.title: SLat Guidance Strength

tex_slat_guidance_rescale.description: Dampens artifacts from high guidance in the texture stage.
tex_slat_guidance_rescale.title: Texture SLat Guidance Rescale
